name: Kung Ming Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shrimp with sesame oil, beaten egg white, and half of the cornstarch. Let stand for 30 minutes or longer.
2. Heat deep-frying oil almost to smoking and add rice noodles. When they puff, remove and drain.
3. Heat peanut oil in a wok and stir-fry the shrimp briefly.
4. Add mushrooms and cook, tossing until done. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
5. Add beaten egg white and toss. Remove shrimp and mushrooms from the pan.
6. Stir onions, ginger, garlic, wine, stock, sugar, and remaining cornstarch in the pan. Cook for 30 seconds.
7. Return shrimp and mushrooms to the pan and heat through.
8. Serve on noodles.
